func newFileWriter() Logger {
	w := &fileLogWriter{
		Daily:		true,
		MaxDays:	7,
		Hourly:		false,
		MaxHours:	168,
		Rotate:		true,
		RotatePerm:	"0440",
		Level:		LevelTrace,
		Perm:		"0660",
		DirPerm:	"0770",
		MaxLines:	10000000,
		MaxFiles:	999,
		MaxSize:	1 << 28,
	}
	w.logFormatter = w
	return w
}
